headline: Closed Rite Aid stores get surprising retail replacement
summary: When Rite Aid, a major pharmacy retailer, filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy a second time in 2025, it led to the shuttering of its 1,250 locations. Over time, many were sold to competitors like CVS and Walgreens, and some spaces were taken up by retailers such as Kroger and Albertsons. But some ...

headline: Kroger draws serious scrutiny over digital price tags
summary: Take a close look at the price tags on the shelves the next time you walk into a Kroger, because something has changed. Kroger confirmed that nearly one in four of its stores nationwide now use electronic shelf labels, the Cincinnati Enquirer reported. The technology allows the company to change ...

headline: Jim Cramer Says SpaceX's Mega Debut Could Unleash A Wave Of AI Deals In The Week Ahead
